school_address.streetAddress: Plot No.1-7-265/5, Hanumannagar, Chaitanyapuri, Hyderabad, Telangana 500060

reviews.author: Gaaana Trushna siri
reviews.review_body:
This is purely a business minded school. @ Sanskrit kids primary school, hanuman nagar, dilsukh nagar.
1.The app They provided MCB is of no use. They will send updates which they can actually send through the mails but we can't communicate with any teacher through the app if we go and ask about it,the receptionist will respond to you rudely as if it is happening with me only.. They will also ask us to complaint through a mail id.so what is the point of having MCB
2.The parent teacher meeting. This is a pure kind of melo drama whenever i attended to it, its like they show the kids progress through marks and if we ask for the support they will say yes we will give mam. But after that they won't even care about it even if we send letters through dairy.
3.My kid is studying in first class...by the time of admission the staff will give you lot of respect and tell you so much, the safety is good but education we can't predict.
In my view they don't want to loose any admission so they will promote the child to next class where they already have two branches providing education till 12 th and after that we will never know what they are teaching.
4.They are not teaching kids about discrimination by colour of children, rich and poor. My kid told me that all the teachers are making that girl so cute and they are not making me cute cause am very thin 😳
5.I also observed this during parent teacher meeting, the teachers let the children (actually parents) participate  in olympiads cause they can collect some fee on it. See everything is a business here.

reviews.author: raman sarma
reviews.review_body: Quite happy after child has completed 2 years. Modern approach makes the difference. And they keep parents involved, very transparent. So it was just perfect for us

reviews.author: L B Anil kumar
reviews.review_body:
I have seen many schools in my experience but sanskriti kids is really superb school with highly qualified teachers n very cooperative administration staff.... thanks to all and

Congratulations to the management for receiving TOP SCHOOL AWARD
Thanking you

reviews.author: sunitha Poreddy
reviews.review_body: First I like this School Name. They have strategies for students development. In class students are encouraged to be more active.

reviews.review_body: Waiting for a branch near kukatpally.
